flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Folsom Lake College rose 29% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.5k → $4.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Folsom Lake College rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.2k → $12.6k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Folsom Lake College fell 21% between 2006 and 2009 (61.0% → 48.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Folsom Lake College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.7% → 0.0%).
